title: Meta bets on Amazon’s 3nm Graviton chips with 192 cores for next-gen AI workloads
description: Meta will deploy tens of millions of AWS Graviton cores as AI demand shifts toward CPU-heavy workloads.

title: $16B Michigan Data Center Project Boosts U.S. AI Infrastructure Expansion
description: Related Digital, a major data center developer, announced on Friday that it has secured $16 billion in financing to support the construction of a large-scale data center campus in Michigan. This significant investment...

title: U.S. Raises Alarm Over Chinese AI Firms’ Alleged IP Theft Through Model Distillation
description: The U.S. State Department has launched a global diplomatic effort to highlight what it describes as large-scale intellectual property theft by Chinese artificial intelligence companies. According to a diplomatic cable...

title: Australia Enlists in AI Bug Hunt: Claude Mythos Targets Hidden Flaws in Global Software Defenses
description: Australia teams with Anthropic's Claude Mythos Preview to detect software flaws, joining a restricted global trial amid warnings of AI's hacking prowess. The model uncovered thousands of zero-days, including a 27-year-old OpenBSD bug, forcing banks and governments to rethink defenses.

title: AI Chip Surge Elevates Taiwan, Korea in Global Equity Rankings
description: The artificial intelligence boom has triggered a seismic reshuffling of global equity markets, with Taiwan and South Korea muscling past European nations one by one.
